properties.name: Feature: 2E Better Subraces
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Adds Proficiencies, Non-Weapon Proficiencies (Skills), and Advanced Effects sections to Subrace records (previously Traits-only) - applied to a character automatically when that subrace is chosen, matching what a base Race already gets. Also adds a Non-Weapon Proficiencies section to the base Race record itself, activating existing stock character-creation logic that had no UI to author it before now.
